title: clive-meta
description: Declarative metadata written by every clive adapter alongside its JUnit XML files. Read by lib/junit-to-hive.py to classify each suite into the hive-ui TestRun schema without heuristics on test names.

client.description: CL client identifier (e.g. lodestar, lighthouse, nimbus).

source_repo.description: GitHub repo the source was cloned from (e.g. ChainSafe/lodestar).

source_ref.description: Tag/branch/SHA the source was checked out at (as provided by the caller, post-resolution).

source_sha.description: Resolved commit SHA at HEAD after checkout.

consensus_spec_tests_ref.description: Effective consensus-spec-tests release tag (after override / pin resolution).

suites.description: One entry per JUnit XML file under ${OUT_DIR}/junit/.

project.description: Client-internal project / suite identifier (e.g. spec-minimal for Lodestar).

preset.description: Preset this suite was run with. Empty when not applicable (e.g. BLS).

fork.description: Fork name when this suite tests a single fork (e.g. gloas). Empty when not applicable or when the suite mixes forks (in which case junit-to-hive.py falls back to per-testcase name parsing).

category.description: Spec test category: sanity | operations | epoch_processing | transition | random | finality | fork_choice | rewards | shuffling | ssz_generic | ssz_static | bls | kzg | light_client | merkle_proof | genesis. Anything else is allowed but won't render specially in the hive-ui CL view.

subcategory.description: Optional finer-grained label (e.g. blocks under sanity).
